name: philippine-demographic-mapper
description: Local-first web app and data pipeline for Philippine demographic choropleth maps.

scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check server.mjs && node --check tools/data-pipeline.mjs && npm run data:validate
scripts.data:build: node tools/data-pipeline.mjs --psgc tools/fixtures/psgc_sample.csv --boundaries tools/fixtures/boundaries_sample.geojson --out data/generated --report data/psgc_reconciliation_report.md --metadata data/source_metadata.json
